Bus fleet performance analytics and punctuality metrics
Rail service performance and delay analytics
(Required) Destination coordinates as lat,lon or ATCO/CRS code

TransportAPI is a managed data service provider for UK public transport, offering real-time and scheduled bus, rail, and multimodal transport data. The API provides journey planning, departure boards, performance analytics, and places lookup across Great Britain.
